subject: [AAI] Update hardcoded certificates
commit_message:
[AAI] Update hardcoded certificates

Currently updating the hardcoded certificates for AAI components still
using it to be valid until jan 2022

Issue-ID: AAI-2841
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I2037d37608023037687340a1cb39772f5174345f
